name: Segmenting Human-LLM Co-authored Text via Change Point Detection
summary: arXiv:2605.03723v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The rise of large language models (LLMs) has created an urgent need to distinguish between human-written and LLM-generated text to ensure a...
description: arXiv:2605.03723v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The rise of large language models (LLMs) has created an urgent need to distinguish between human-written and LLM-generated text to ensure authenticity and societal trust. Existing detectors typically provide a binary classification for an entire passage; however, this is insufficient for human--LLM co-authored text, where the objective i...
author: Mengchu Li, Jin Zhu, Jinglai Li, Chengchun Shi
